# Frontend Stack Blueprint

> Canonical frontend stack reference for AI coding agents. Platform-
> agnostic: same core stack for any project. Deployment targets are
> optional layers.

## Consumer Contract (read first)

- Audience: external coding agents consuming this repository as reference.
- This file is a navigation index for fast retrieval.
- For full operational rules, use `llms-full.txt`.
- If any document conflicts, treat `stack.yaml` as the source of truth.
- Local maintenance workflow lives in `.claude/skills/blueprint-maintenance/SKILL.md`.

## Universal Governance (technology-agnostic)

- Keep one canonical source of truth for rules and versions.
- Keep machine-readable artifacts and narrative docs synchronized.
- Classify changes by impact/risk before implementation.
- Apply **Official CLI-First** when official docs recommend a CLI.
- Run **Impact Preflight** before any official CLI execution.
- If Impact Preflight is non-trivial or uncertain, ask developer confirmation before running CLI.
- Never silently remove consolidated decisions; deprecate with migration path.
- Use explicit dates and absolute versions for temporal claims.
- If context is ambiguous, ask the developer instead of guessing.

## Stack (applies to every project)

- [Full Spec](stack/STACK.md): Complete manifest
- [Architecture](stack/architecture.md): Modular, DRY, KISS, YAGNI
- [Core](stack/core.md): TypeScript, React, TanStack Router / React Router
- [Tooling](stack/tooling.md): pnpm (priority), Node.js default, Bun alternative
- [Build & Test](stack/build-and-test.md): Vite (Node.js >=20.19 or >=22.12), Vitest, Husky
- [Production Reliability](stack/reliability.md): CI, Playwright, WCAG 2.2, Web Vitals, rollout and rollback
- [Frontend Security](stack/security.md): Typed environment, supply chain, CSP, privacy
- [API Boundaries](stack/api-boundaries.md): fetch, Zod, cancellation, retry, MSW
- [UI](stack/ui.md): Radix UI, shadcn/ui, Floating UI, Embla, cmdk
- [Forms](stack/forms.md): React Hook Form + Zod
- [Data Access](stack/data-access.md): Prisma ≥6 (recommended when ORM-backed server-side or edge data access is needed)
- [Authentication](stack/auth.md): Better Auth ≥1 (recommended when the project needs authentication)
- [Managed Services](stack/managed-services.md): Neon Postgres, Cloudflare D1, Cloudflare R2, Cloudflare KV, Resend (optional, capability-based)
- [Styling](stack/styling.md): Tailwind CSS, Motion
- [DESIGN.md Design Contract](stack/design-system.md): Provisional project visual intent and source tokens
- [State](stack/state-and-data.md): Zustand + TanStack Query (TanStack Store replaces Zustand at v1 GA)
- [Dates](stack/dates.md): date-fns
- [Content](stack/content.md): Lexical, ProseMirror, Shiki
- [Advanced Capabilities](stack/advanced-capabilities.md): Capability-gated Markdown, tables, charts, diagrams, editor, terminal, collaboration, and PDF surfaces
- [i18n](stack/i18n.md): Format.js, react-intl
- [Observability](stack/observability.md): Sentry, OTel, Statsig
- [Icons](stack/icons.md): Lucide (default), Phosphor, Tabler
- [Machine-readable](stack.yaml): Versions and install commands
- [Agent contract](agent-contract.json): Generated execution and safety rules
- [Project profiles](profiles/README.md): Capability activation and evidence

## Deployment Targets (optional)

- [Overview](targets/TARGETS.md): When to use each
- [Browser](targets/browser.md)
- [Cloudflare Pages](targets/cloudflare-pages.md)
- [Vercel](targets/vercel.md)
- [Electron](targets/electron.md)
- [Tauri](targets/tauri.md)
- [PWA](targets/pwa.md)

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: AGENT CONTRACT -->
## Agent-Native Contract (generated)

Blueprint `1.9.0`. Canonical machine sources:
`stack.yaml`, `agent-contract.json`, `schemas/`, and `profiles/`.

Foundations:

- Inspect the consuming repository before proposing dependencies or file changes.
- Run Impact Preflight before official CLIs or non-trivial writes.
- Activate only profiles and capabilities supported by explicit project evidence.
- Run the applicable project checks and the conformance checker after changes.

Profile activation:

- The core profile applies to every consuming frontend project.
- Browser, networked, production, component-platform, Electron, and PWA profiles are capability-gated.
- Create or enforce root DESIGN.md only when the product has explicit visual intent or source tokens.
- Document temporary exceptions with an owner, reason, and expiry date.

Prohibited behavior:

- Do not install the full catalog by default.
- Do not place secrets in client-visible environment variables or generated reports.
- Do not infer optional profiles from preference alone.
- Do not edit generated agent blocks manually; regenerate them from this contract.

Apply or audit the contract with `skills/apply-frontend-blueprint/SKILL.md` and
`node scripts/check-project-conformance.mjs --project <path> --format json`.
<!-- END GENERATED: AGENT CONTRACT -->
